Industry Focus

Built for your sector's planning challenges

Simbus brings deep domain expertise to Kinaxis deployments — not generic supply chain consulting. Select your industry below.

Compliance-ready planning for pharma manufacturers

The pharmaceutical sector faces intense pressure — from CDSCO compliance and serialization mandates to batch-controlled inventory and unpredictable API demand. Excel-driven planning cannot keep pace.

  • Batch expiry and FEFO management failing in spreadsheets
  • Siloed demand signals between formulation, API, and packaging
  • Regulatory-driven SKU proliferation overloading planners
  • No scenario visibility for new product introductions or regulatory delays
  • Late S&OP cycles missing cross-functional alignment

Demand & Consensus Planning

Connect commercial, medical, and supply planning into a single consensus forecast. Simulate regulatory approval scenarios and new molecule launches before committing supply.

+15–20% Forecast Accuracy

Batch & Inventory Control

Manage shelf-life constraints, FEFO sequencing, and excess/obsolete inventory with automated policies — and full audit trails for GMP compliance.

−18% Inventory Carrying Cost

Supply & Capacity Visibility

Real-time constraint visibility across API, formulation, and fill-finish. Identify gating materials before they become stock-outs.

3× Faster Disruption Response

Regulatory Alignment

Implementation methodology includes CDSCO, Schedule M, and export market (US FDA / EMA) planning workflow templates — pre-built for pharma manufacturers.

End-to-end visibility for complex chemical supply chains

Specialty chemical manufacturers contend with long lead times, hazmat logistics constraints, highly variable raw material prices, and customer-specific formulations. Planners need more than a spreadsheet.

  • Long-horizon raw material procurement with no demand signal alignment
  • Campaign-based production making capacity planning opaque
  • Hazmat storage limits creating hidden inventory policy gaps
  • Customer-specific blends multiplying SKU complexity
  • Seasonal demand spikes (Agchem, Coatings) with no forward buffer strategy

Supply & Materials Planning

Align long-lead raw material procurement with demand signal — identify excess and gating materials early, before campaign scheduling locks capacity.

−15% Excess & Obsolete Inventory

Scenario Planning

Model price spike scenarios, alternative sourcing strategies, and capacity trade-offs — then bring aligned recommendations to executive S&OP without delay.

+31% Faster Planning Cycles

Inventory Policies by Segment

Differentiate inventory targets by customer tier, product margin, and hazmat classification. Reduce working capital without increasing service-level risk.

−18% Inventory Cost Reduction

Chemicals Sector Fit

Pre-configured templates for Agchem seasonality, MSIHC compliance checks, and port-linked import lead time variability built into Simbus's RapidStart templates.

Resilient planning for automotive and spare parts manufacturers

The auto components sector faces JIT pressure, platform proliferation, multi-tier supply disruptions, and the accelerating shift to EV platforms. Planning complexity has never been higher.

  • OEM schedule volatility cascading into tier-2/3 supplier shortfalls
  • Aftermarket demand patterns disconnected from service parts planning
  • EV/ICE platform transitions creating obsolescence risk in service inventory
  • Long-tail SKU proliferation in spare parts overwhelming manual planners
  • No end-to-end supply visibility across multi-plant, multi-warehouse networks

Supply Chain Control Tower

Unified end-to-end visibility across OEM schedules, tier supplier confirmations, plant capacity, and outbound logistics. Know about disruptions before they hit your line.

3× Faster Disruption Response

Service Parts & Aftermarket Planning

Statistical demand models for long-tail service parts with automatic slow-mover flagging and excess/obsolescence analysis as vehicle platforms age.

−18% Service Inventory Cost

Concurrent S&OP

Synchronize commercial, engineering, and supply plans across OEM and replacement market channels — with role-based dashboards for plant heads and leadership.

+20% Planning Efficiency

ACMA & OEM Program Ready

IATF-aligned planning workflows, OEM kanban integration, and multi-echelon distribution planning for national dealer networks — built into Simbus templates.

Deployment Approach

From signed contract to live system in 16 weeks

Kinaxis RapidStart paired with Simbus's industry-specific implementation playbook means no drawn-out pilots — a full in-production go-live on a fixed, predictable timeline.

01

Discovery & Data Readiness

Weeks 1–3. Structured data readiness review — ERP extraction, master data quality assessment, and planning process mapping aligned to your industry's workflows.

02

Configure & Integrate

Weeks 4–12. Planning One is configured using RapidStart industry templates customized for your network. ERP integrations (SAP, Oracle, local ERPs) built and validated with your data.

03

Go Live & Embed

Weeks 13–16. Parallel run, planner enablement, and go-live. Simbus supports through 2–3 live planning cycles to ensure adoption — then transitions to AMS if needed.

Product Capabilities

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

Planning One combines control tower essentials with concurrent planning — all on the Kinaxis Maestro platform. Expand at your own pace with zero loss of investment.

Demand Planning

Consensus Demand & Forecast

Statistical forecasting with forecast accuracy measurement, FVA analysis, and assumption management across commercial and supply teams.

  • Consensus demand planning across functions
  • Forecast accuracy & FVA dashboards
  • Assumption management & override tracking
Supply Planning

Material & Constraint Planning

Real-time identification of gating and excess materials with constraint-aware planning that flags supply risks before they become expedites.

  • Excess & gating materials identification
  • Constraint load analysis
  • Root cause analysis with actionable insights
Inventory Management

Inventory Policy & Optimization

Policy-driven inventory management with ongoing excess & obsolete monitoring, transfer recommendations, and quality ratio tracking.

  • Inventory analysis & policy setting
  • E&O identification and action
  • Inventory transfer recommendations
S&OP / Operational

Executive S&OP & Annual Planning

Role-based dashboards, target setting, and executive review workflows that connect operational planning to strategic business objectives.

  • Annual plan management & target setting
  • Role-based S&OP dashboards
  • Executive review & approval workflows
Control Tower

End-to-End Supply Chain Visibility

Real-time exception management with smart collaboration tools — so your team spends time resolving issues, not finding them.

  • End-to-end network visibility
  • Automated exception alerts
  • Collaborative resolution workflows
Expand Later

Zero Lock-In Growth Path

Planning One is a fully expandable foundation. Add capabilities as your maturity grows — no rip-and-replace, no data migration, no loss of investment.

  • Demand sensing & advanced analytics
  • Supplier collaboration portal
  • Inventory optimization & production scheduling
Why Simbus

Domain-focused. Outcome-linked. Senior-led.

As an authorized Kinaxis® Planning One™ VAR, Simbus brings more than a software licence — we bring implementation expertise, local presence, and a commitment to your outcomes.

Most supply chain software projects fail not because of the technology — but because of implementation, change management, and post-go-live abandonment. Simbus was built to solve exactly that.

We are a Bangalore-headquartered consulting firm with deep Kinaxis platform expertise and industry specialization across Pharma, Chemicals, and Automotive. Every engagement is led by senior consultants — not staffed with juniors after the sale.

  • Region-specific implementation playbook

    RapidStart templates adapted for SAP, Oracle, Navision, and local ERPs; GST-aligned data structures; and local logistics network configurations.

  • Outcome-linked commercials

    Shared risk-reward engagement structures. We succeed when you see measurable improvements in forecast accuracy, inventory turns, and planning cycle time.

  • End-to-end relationship

    From licence through implementation, AMS, and value realisation sprints — one accountable partner for the life of your Kinaxis investment.

  • Databricks integration capability

    Unique among Kinaxis partners: Simbus can build advanced data quality pipelines and AI analytics layers on Databricks to supercharge Planning One's accuracy.

Simbus Service Portfolio

Planning One Licence & Implementation

Authorized reseller — competitive licence pricing with full RapidStart implementation. Fixed-price, 16-week delivery with a defined go-live milestone.

Application Management Services (AMS)

Post-go-live L2/L3 support with 16×5 standard coverage and 24×7 P1 on-call. Monthly SLA dashboards and a dedicated KAM — not a helpdesk ticket queue.

Value Realisation Sprints

Platform live but planners still on spreadsheets? Outcome-linked sprints close the ROI gap — targeting +15–20% forecast accuracy improvement.

Implementation Recovery

Stalled or failed Kinaxis deployment? Simbus diagnoses and remediates — fixed-price diagnostic with transparent roadmap and exit clause protection.

Free Kinaxis Health Check

Already on Kinaxis? No-commitment assessment of configuration gaps, underutilised features, and quick-win optimisation opportunities.
